# Claudio Cáceres

> Senior Software Engineer and full-stack developer with 10+ years of experience building and scaling web applications. Specializes in Python (Django, Flask), JavaScript (React), cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP), and Agile development.

## About

Based in Buenos Aires, Argentina. Available for remote work. Focus areas: backend APIs, frontend development, CI/CD, and cloud-native applications.
